AI.rationale: NVDA Q2 FY26 $46.7B (+56% YoY), Q3 guide $54B, Blackwell Ultra ramping, $4T market cap July 9; MSFT FY25 Q4 Azure +39%, AI contributing 12pp; MSFT Fairwater AI datacenter Sept 18 ($3.3B Wisconsin); GOOGL Q2 Cloud +32%, capex $85B; DOJ remedies ruling Sept 2 avoided break-up.

rockets_spacecraft.rationale: RKLB Q2 record $144M (+36%), gross margin +650bps; Geost acquisition $275M; Neutron LC-3 ribbon-cutting late Aug/early Sept; SDA Tranche 2 $515M build. Neutron 2025 first-launch target reaffirmed but pre-flight.

engineered_biology.rationale: ARKG below 2021 peak as of Sept 2025 despite broader healthcare recovery. Sector M&A heating up (Takeda partner $250M) but no re-rating of public names. Waiting for clinical proof points.

quantum.rationale: QTUM crossed $2B AUM Sept 4; HSBC used IBM Heron for bond trading (first commercial quantum edge); DOE $625M renewal for 5 national quantum research centers. Pre-commercial revenue.

nuclear_fusion.rationale: Palisades transitioned from decommissioning to operational status Aug 25 (first ever); DOE $155M Sept release; Big Tech (AMZN/GOOGL/META) pledged tripling nuclear capacity by 2050; MSFT joined WNA Sept 8; NRC reform EO with 18-month decision deadlines.

general_markets.rationale: Fed cut 25bp to 4.00-4.25% Sept 17 (first 2025 cut, 2 more signaled); gold record $3,869 Sept 30 (~+27% YTD); AGG Morningstar Gold; VIG steady.
